## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Given the epic goals, when all child items are complete, then the defined business outcome is achieved.
- [ ] Given release readiness checks, when this epic is reviewed, then no critical open blockers remain.

## Done Criteria
- [ ] All linked child stories/tasks are completed or explicitly descoped
- [ ] Outcome and success metrics are measured/reported
- [ ] Documentation and runbooks are updated where applicable
- [ ] Relevant stakeholders confirm acceptance
